description: Embedded in-process Quick Look preview pane (ActionUIQuickLook add-on). macOS QLPreviewView; iOS/visionOS QLPreviewController. Previews a local file, driven by the element value or the filePath property. (Quick Look is local-only, so there is no remote url property.)

filePath.description: Absolute local path to the file to preview (seed for the element value)

previewStyle.description: macOS only; QLPreviewView style. Default normal. Ignored on iOS

showsChrome.description: Show preview chrome: a nav bar (title + share/actions) on iOS, or a header (file name + share/open) on macOS. Default false

valueChangeActionID.description: Fired after the previewed item changes (reload dispatched)

value.description: Current source file path; write a local file path to preview
